atomic_facts.fact: The man holds both hands up in a double thumbs-up gesture in the first frame.
The man lowers his hands and looks down in the second frame.
The text on the shirt reads 'DOUG PECK SUNDAY 10th CONCERT PASS'.

spatial: The man is centered in the foreground. The white text is printed on the front of his black t-shirt, located below his neck.

visible_entities.desc: person with curly blonde hair, wearing a black t-shirt with white text

atomic_facts.fact: The person points both index fingers directly at the camera.
The person is wearing a black t-shirt with white text.
The text on the shirt reads 'DOUG PECK' and 'BASH'.

spatial: The person is in the center of the frame. The text on the t-shirt is located on the person's chest, below their face.
